privileged_info_summary: The streaming dataset is completely synthetically generated, producing exactly 500 records. The task requires saving the reconciled file to /home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/royalty_statement_Q3.xlsx and applies rates (Tidal: 0.0125, Apple Music: 0.00735, Spotify: 0.00437, Amazon Music: 0.00402, YouTube: 0.00069) to calculate gross royalties, artist splits, and platform totals which are strictly evaluated by the verifier.
